title: Jake Felan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Jake}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:JakeFelan.png]] |name=Jake Felan |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Smuggler|Smuggler Trainer|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|An old contact of mine, Jake Felan, has a job. He may take a little convincing. He's usually a pretty upstanding guy though. You should have no trouble.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|}} '''Jake Felan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Han Solo thought you might have work for a good smuggler.''"
"''I do. And you are a good smuggler, I guess.|A spacer and Jake Felan|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Smuggler|Tricks of the Trade|Tansarii Point Station}}}} After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Jake Felan was working from [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Jake Felan needed to move a crate of sliced weapons off [[Station Gamma]], another [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the Bright Jewel system. In the meantime, a spacer arrived on Tansarii Point Station along with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. The spacer was in fact a young smuggler under training and Solo advised the spacer to work for Felan, an old contact of him. The spacer met Jake Felan in the cantina of Tansarii Point Station and accepted to take a job from him. The spacer therefore took a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to Station Gamma and brought a case of sliced weapons back to Tansarii Point Station. However, while arriving at the drop off point, on the bottom level of the station, the spacer encountered [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[TK-363]]. Instead of just shooting him, the spacer lured the soldier and managed to convince him to let him access to the Storage room 02. The spacer dumped the weapons as planned and finally returned to Jake Felan. Felan paid the spacer 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credit]] for the successful work. ==Behind the scenes== Jake Felan appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Jake Felan was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Smuggler Trainer}} *{{SWGWiki|Tricks of the Trade}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Felan, Jake}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Smugglers]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
